allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.argv=['x']; from router import Router; r = Router\(db_factory=lambda: None\); print\('routes:'\); [print\(' ', m, p\) for \(m,p\) in sorted\(r.routes\)]")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== streams ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing 'http://127.0.0.1:1984/api/streams' -TimeoutSec 5\).Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output "`n=== probe cam1 \(RTSP pull test\) ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing 'http://127.0.0.1:1984/api/streams?src=cam1' -TimeoutSec 12\).Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== live go2rtc \(1984\) streams ==="; try { $j=\(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing 'http://127.0.0.1:1984/api/streams' -TimeoutSec 8 | ConvertFrom-Json\); foreach\($n in $j.PSObject.Properties.Name\){ $s=$j.$n; $pr=$s.producers; $cn=$s.consumers; $b= if\($pr\){$pr[0].bytes_recv}else{'-'}; $src= if\($pr\){$pr[0].url}else{'?'}; "$n : bytes_recv=$b consumers=$\($cn.Count\) src=$src" } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
